description: Project-specific pre-action gates. Add, remove, or disable rules as needed.

gates.name: no-force-push
gates.message: Force push blocked. Use regular push or ask first.

gates.name: no-credentials-in-files
gates.message: Credential/API key detected. Use environment variables instead.

gates.name: no-delete-project-memory
gates.message: Protected: Do not delete anything inside .claude/ (primer, gates, lessons, memory).

gates.name: auto-always-run-tests-before-commit
gates.message: Repeated mistake (3x): Always run tests before committing

gates.name: auto-always-confirm-path-before-des
gates.message: Repeated mistake (3x): Always confirm path before destructive commands
